axioms.text: Avoid analogy bias. All strategies must be deconstructed to First Principles to avoid 'Uber-for-X' failure modes.
Verify First Principles before Expansion. Expansion without a grounded anchor leads to hallucinated logic.
Flag semantic loops early. If refinement gain is <20%, pivot to a new trajectory.
Monopolies start with a dominant share of a small, specific market (Thiel Principle).

metadata.description: Industrial-grade persistence layer for strategic reasoning.
